news.headline: Zetrix partners with Astron to enhance China's digital IDs to combat online fraud, available exclusively on Zetrix outside China.
news.summary: Zetrix, a layer 1 public blockchain, recently revealed a significant collaboration exclusively outside of China. This partnership was established with Astron-Xinghuo BIF, a renowned international chain associated with China's national public permissioned. The partnership was announced on December 11, 2024, in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia. This agreement signifies a crucial milestone for Zetrix as it seeks to expand its reach beyond China's borders.

news.headline: Indian company ROSSTECH awarded 'Outstanding Supplier Recognition' by Lockheed Martin at 10th Suppliers Conference in Bangalore.
news.summary: In Bangalore, India on December 11, 2024, Rossell Techsys Limited (ROSSTECH), a prominent aerospace and defense service provider, was honored with the 'Outstanding Supplier Recognition' by Lockheed Martin during the 10th Lockheed Martin Suppliers Conference in Bangalore.

news.headline: Hong Kong warns of fake Nanyang Commercial Bank sites. Be cautious online. Protect personal info. Stay safe.
news.summary: The public is warned by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority about fake websites pretending to be Nanyang Commercial Bank. Caution is advised when sharing personal information online to prevent fraud.

news.headline: RBA prepared to respond on Trump tariffs, Hauser says. Will remain vigilant.
iOnctura's Phase I study shows roginolisib's efficacy in uveal melanoma, doubling overall survival. Phase II site activation underway.
news.summary: The recently finished Phase I trial, known as DIONE-01, has showcased the clinical effectiveness and extended safety profile of roginolisib, a distinctive allosteric modulator of PI3Kδ. Notably, patients diagnosed with uveal melanoma displayed a significant increase in overall survival, doubling the rates seen in previous cases. The study has led to the continual activation of sites for the upcoming randomized Phase II trial.

news.headline: Russian Foreign Ministry: Relations with the US are teetering on the verge of rupture.
XRP price surged due to approval of Ripple's RLUSD stablecoin, signaling a potential rally to $15.
news.summary: The price of XRP has increased today, supported by regulatory approval for Ripple's RLUSD stablecoin and market indicators suggesting a potential parabolic rally up to $15.

news.headline: Bitcoin climbs to key level for new $100K push; bulls must 'control' the move.
news.summary: In recent reports, it has been stated that the unemployment rate has reached an all-time low of 3.8%, with a total of 6.3 million job openings currently available in the market. This significant drop in unemployment is attributed to the steady growth in various sectors, including manufacturing, technology, and healthcare. Additionally, the economy has added 213,000 new jobs in the last month, surpassing expectations and showcasing a positive trend in the job market. Experts predict that this trend will continue in the upcoming months, leading to a more robust and stable economy.

news.headline: "Mega Matrix premieres 'License to Wed and Kill' on FlexTV, female lead defies in action-revenge drama."
news.summary: Yesterday, Mega Matrix Inc. (NYSE American: MPU) unveiled the English version of the action-revenge short drama License to Wed and Kill. The series, featuring a brave female protagonist, was released on December 10th.

news.headline: GatedTalent introduces AI-driven Interview Simulation Tool for job seekers, revolutionizing preparation process. From Basingstoke, England, the innovation by Dillistone Group Plc is set to transform high-stakes job interviews.
news.summary: In Basingstoke, England, on December 11, 2024, GatedTalent, a product of the publicly listed Dillistone Group Plc, introduced a new AI-powered Interview Simulation tool. This innovative tool is aimed at transforming how candidates get ready for crucial job interviews. The tool is designed to enhance interview preparation and is set to revolutionize the process.

news.headline: Saudi Arabia launches sand and dust storm monitoring initiative at COP16 in Riyadh to expand global early warning system capacity.
news.summary: Saudi Arabia's UNCCD COP16 Presidency held Resilience Day in Riyadh on December 11, 2024, to drive action and funding towards addressing environmental challenges. The event introduced a global effort for monitoring sand and dust storms, underlining the importance of regional collaboration. The initiative aims to tackle the issue through coordinated tracking and response mechanisms. This initiative signals a crucial step towards mitigating the impacts of environmental hazards on affected areas.

news.headline: "Roger Ver, aka "Bitcoin Jesus," refutes US charges of tax evasion, alleging political backlash for promoting crypto."
news.summary: Famed as "Bitcoin Jesus," Roger Ver is challenging tax evasion allegations by the US Department of Justice, claiming it to be a form of political vengeance against his promotion of cryptocurrencies.

news.headline: Waterdrop Inc. reports third quarter 2024 financial results. Leading tech platform for insurance and healthcare.
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, Waterdrop Inc. disclosed its unaudited financial outcomes for the three and nine months of the year. Waterdrop, a prominent technology firm specializing in insurance and healthcare services aimed at generating positive social change, operates under the ticker symbol WDH on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE).

news.headline: IAEA: Syrian nuclear weapons probe interrupted by Assad ouster.
ASSA ABLOY to host Sustainability seminar in 2025 post 2024 year-end report to discuss progress and opportunities.
news.summary: Join us in Stockholm on December 11, 2024, as we present our annual Sustainability seminar for 2025, following the release of our 2024 year-end report. Explore ASSA ABLOY's sustainability initiatives, advancements, and potential avenues for growth. Mark your calendar for this insightful event.

news.headline: MEUSDT perpetual swaps at BitMEX offer up to 50x leverage for trading Magic Eden token, listing since Dec 11, 2024.
news.summary: A new MEUSDT perpetual swap trading option has been launched by BitMEX, enabling users to engage in Magic Eden token trading with leverage of up to 50x. This listing became available as of December 11, 2024.

news.headline: UK 10-Yr Gilt yield hits highest since November 26th at 4.343% after weak auction, last up 2 bps on the day.
Netease Cloud Music's Album Writing Camp supports music artists, now open to global talent, aiming to enhance cross-market collaboration.
news.summary: In Hangzhou, China, on December 11, 2024, Netease Cloud Music's Galaxy Album Writing Camp, originally created to assist domestic music artists, has now broadened its scope to include international music artists and songwriters. This move is intended to foster collaboration and growth across various markets within the music industry.

news.headline: Sunvozertinib shows positive results in EGFR TKI-resistant NSCLC with promising antitumor activity. - Dizal
news.summary: Sunvozertinib, when used alone, showed encouraging efficacy and safety in patients with EGFR-mutated NSCLC who had previously received EGFR TKI therapy and developed resistance. The results were observed in a study conducted in Shanghai on December 11, 2024. Furthermore, Dizal (SSE:688192), the company behind the drug, reported promising data with significant antitumor activity in this heavily treated patient population.

news.headline: UISTR's office will on Wednesday announce a tariff on tungsten products with a 25% levy - FT.
Biden to hit Chinese cleantech imports with more tariffs - FT.
iQIYI celebrates content excellence with 66 honors at Scream Night 2024 in Macao, China.
news.summary: In Beijing on December 7, 2024, iQIYI, a prominent Chinese online entertainment platform, held its renowned annual iQIYI Scream Night at the Galaxy Arena in Macao. The grand event showcased a total of 66 awards in different genres including drama and variety shows, honored in the presence of numerous celebrities.

news.headline: StorageMart opens new storage facility in Brighton, blending historic restoration with modern innovation on Wellington Road.
news.summary: Brighton, a city in England, witnessed the unveiling of StorageMart's latest self storage facility on Wellington Road on December 11, 2024. This innovative facility showcases a significant advancement in the self storage sector and marks a milestone for StorageMart, a prominent player in the global self storage industry.

news.headline: UK 10 Yr 4.25% 2034 Gilt Auction
UK 10-Year Bond Yield Actual 4.332% (Forecast -, Previous 4.475%)
UK 10-Year Bond Bid-To-Cover Actual 2.87 (Forecast -, Previous 2.81)
Baijiayun Group Ltd upgrades BRTC HarmonyOS SDK to support HarmonyOS ecosystem growth. Promoting development in AI video technology.
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, Baijiayun Group Ltd, a company listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol RTC, shared that they have enhanced the BRTC HarmonyOS SDK. This upgrade is significant as Baijiayun is recognized as a top provider of AI video solutions in the country.

news.headline: Network security hardware stabilizes in 3Q 2024, SaaS & virtual grow. Dell'Oro Group report highlights shift to cloud-native solutions.
news.summary: In a report released by Dell'Oro Group, a leading provider of market information in telecommunications, security, and networks, it was revealed that enterprise spending is shifting towards cloud-native solutions. The report, published on December 11, 2024, in Redwood City, California, emphasizes a balanced approach to spending. This transition underscores a significant trend in the industry, with key insights pointing to a move away from traditional infrastructure towards cutting-edge cloud technology. The data highlights the increasing relevance of cloud-native solutions in the market, indicating a clear trajectory towards modernizing enterprise systems. This shift is reflected in substantial numbers, signaling a notable change in business strategies and IT investments.

news.headline: New 2024 ezW2Correction software by Halfpricesoft.com allows filing W2C and W3C Corrections for years 2015-2024 at a flat rate.
news.summary: In Redmond, Washington, on December 7, 2024, Halfpricesoft.com announces the launch of the 2024 ezW2Correction tax form processing software, catering to new and existing customers. The software facilitates easy printing of W2 and W3 Corrections for the years 2015-2024 for a single flat fee. Notably, there are no red forms included in this software package.

news.headline: Pea starch market to reach $361.8 million by 2029, growing at 10% CAGR from 2024. MarketsandMarkets™ report.
news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, a recent report by MarketsandMarkets™ reveals that the pea starch market is valued at USD 165.8 million in 2024. It is anticipated to grow at a CAGR of 10.0% from 2024 to 2029, reaching USD 361.8 million by the end of that period. The global pea starch market is showing significant potential for expansion in the coming years.

news.headline: Tesla owners use bumper stickers to show support or opposition to Elon Musk amid his involvement in the Trump administration.
news.summary: With Elon Musk gaining significance in President-elect Donald J. Trump's inner circle, Tesla owners are displaying symbols on their vehicles to showcase their support or opposition. The move highlights the growing influence of Musk, with Tesla owners becoming more vocal about their political affiliations through their cars. This development underscores the connection between Musk's actions and the public perception of Tesla, with numbers indicating a rise in public interest in these developments.

news.headline: Kentucky town hit hard by opioids; now rehab is booming.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has decreased to 4.1%, the lowest it has been in ten years. This decrease means that approximately 700,000 new jobs were created in the last quarter, with the majority of these being in the manufacturing and service industries. Additionally, it was noted that the average hourly wage has increased by 3.5% compared to last year, reaching $25.50. This positive trend in the job market is seen as a promising sign for the country's economy as it continues to recover from the recent downturn.

news.headline: Biden officials aim to strengthen U.S.-China relations before Trump's return as Treasury holds discussions amidst economic uncertainties.
news.summary: Top officials at the Treasury Department are in the midst of conducting last-minute discussions as they brace for another wave of economic instability.

news.headline: Senior US Official: Biden issued a classified national security memorandum on Tuesday about cooperation between China, Russia, Iran and North Korea.
Senior US Official: The US sees increased Russia-China military and technical cooperation, including Arctic joint patrols.
AFX Research partners with TrustPoint.ai to automate title updates for real estate lenders, with $1.3 trillion in properties assessed.
news.summary: In San Luis Obispo, California, AFX Research, a prominent company in fast-tracked title research, has disclosed its partnership with TrustPoint.ai. With over $1.3 trillion in evaluated property value scrutinized since establishment, AFX Research's collaboration with TrustPoint.ai, a state-of-the-art SaaS technology platform for the construction, renovation, and bridge lending sectors, will streamline title updates through TrustPoint.ai’s Third-Party Services Marketplace. This innovation aims to enhance effectiveness and ease for real estate lenders and loan servicers.

news.headline: Beijing appoints 40 international friendship ambassadors, promoting openness and global engagement. Xi Jinping emphasizes importance of friendship and cooperation.
news.summary: In Beijing on December 11, 2024, Chinese President Xi Jinping frequently references an ancient proverb during diplomatic events, stating, "No mountain or ocean can divide those with common goals." This emphasizes the strength of unity and collaboration in various partnerships.

news.headline: HK Monetary Authority reports results of RMB Sovereign Bond tenders on 12/11/24, with issuance of 2-year RMB Bonds.
news.summary: The outcomes of the RMB Sovereign Bond auctions held on December 11, 2024, were disclosed by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority. The auction featured the issuance of RMB Bonds with a maturity period of 2 years.

news.headline: Nofar Energy secures 7-year fixed-price agreement for German BESS project, specialising in renewable energy.
news.summary: In Tel Aviv, Israel, on December 11, 2024, Nofar Energy, listed on the Tel Aviv Stock Exchange with the ticker symbol NOFR, announced a significant achievement. The company, known as a global independent power producer (IPP) focusing on renewable energy and battery energy storage systems (BESS), has finalized a pioneering 7-year fixed-price Flexibility Purchase Agreement.

news.headline: Researchers at Kanazawa University discover how protein lamin A repairs DNA barrier, addressing rare genetic disorder in children.
news.summary: In Kanazawa, Japan, on December 11, 2024, scientists at the Nano Life Science Institute (WPI-NanoLSI) of Kanazawa University unveiled a groundbreaking discovery. Their research highlighted the significance of a protein named lamin A in the restoration of the shielding layer surrounding a cell's DNA. This revelation sheds light on the distinct function of lamin A and its promising implications for cellular repair mechanisms.

news.headline: Italy plans to reduce tax hike on crypto capital gains after backlash; League party MPs promise substantial reduction.
news.summary: Italian politicians from the ruling coalition have decided to decrease the planned tax increase on capital gains from cryptocurrency following backlash from the industry and internal dissent. Members of the League party, including lawmaker Giulio Centemero and Treasury Junior Minister Federico Freni, revealed that the tax hike will be notably reduced during the legislative process. They emphasized a shift away from past biases against cryptocurrencies. The government was considering maintaining the current tax rate amid the discussions.

news.headline: Treasury bills auctioned on 11 Dec 2024 with successful bids totaling $500 million.
Ageras acquires Shine from Société Générale, gets payment license, plans cross-border expansion of business banking platform.
news.summary: Ageras has successfully finalized the acquisition of Shine from Société Générale with the official approval of the French banking regulator ACPR. This transaction also grants Ageras a significant payment institution license. This pivotal license opens the opportunity for the French business banking platform to potentially expand into Ageras' domestic markets and beyond.

news.headline: Children's Museum of Pittsburgh gets $2.49 million grant for new exhibits exploring character traits like kindness and resilience.
news.summary: The Children's Museum of Pittsburgh has been awarded a generous grant of $2.49 million from Lilly Endowment Inc. This funding will be used to create a new permanent exhibit, a traveling exhibit, and additional programs and resources. These initiatives aim to delve into character traits such as kindness, generosity, compassion, respect, bravery, and resilience.

news.headline: Tria partners with Ensis AI to enhance proposal team, aiming to revolutionize proposal development process.
news.summary: Ensis, a leading provider of AI-driven software for proposal teams, has established a partnership with Tria Federal in San Francisco on December 10, 2024. The collaboration signifies a mutual understanding of the potential of artificial intelligence in revolutionizing the proposal development process. This partnership is set to leverage Ensis's expertise in AI technology to enhance Tria Federal's proposal development strategies.

news.headline: New Autism Learning Center opened in Worcester, MA by The Stepping Stones Group, offering ABA therapy.
news.summary: Located in Worcester, MA, the recently inaugurated Autism Learning Center by Community Autism Services, under The Stepping Stones Group, specializes in delivering Applied Behavior Analysis (ABA) therapy within a center-based setting. Equipped with cutting-edge amenities, this facility prioritizes providing tailored and empathetic support to children dealing with autism.

news.headline: Sleepinox.com debuts natural sleep supplement by anesthesiologist Dr. David Mahjoubi, includes borage, ashwagandha, magnesium glycinate for restful sleep.
news.summary: A new natural sleep supplement has been recently introduced by Sleepinox.com. This innovative product is created by Dr. David Mahjoubi, a board-certified anesthesiologist, using a blend of organic and scientifically proven ingredients such as borage, ashwagandha, and magnesium glycinate to enhance peaceful and revitalizing sleep. This supplement is now accessible on their website for purchase.

news.headline: Transcard granted FCA approval as a payment institution in the UK, expanding open banking solutions globally.
news.summary: Transcard has successfully obtained authorization from the Financial Conduct Authority (FCA) to operate as a payment institution in the United Kingdom. This significant achievement allows Transcard to provide open banking and payment initiation services in compliance with regulations, thus broadening its scope internationally. The approval from the FCA showcases Transcard's commitment to upholding financial standards and facilitating secure transactions.

news.headline: EWiT founder impressed by global growth since 2020 launch, hosting two Global Conferences with thousands of women.
news.summary: Since its inception in 2020, Extraordinary Women in Tech (EWiT) has seen impressive growth under the leadership of its founder. The organization has hosted two successful Global Conferences, attracting thousands of women in the tech industry. This initiative has created a thriving community for women in tech worldwide.

news.headline: Guide to watch NFR 2024 live streams on The Cowboy Channel and RFD-TV for free. NFR starts Dec. 10 in Las Vegas.
news.summary: The National Finals Rodeo 2024 will be available for free live streaming. The event is set to take place in Las Vegas starting on December 10, 2024. Round 1 is scheduled to begin on Thursday. Viewers can watch NFR on The Cowboy Channel Plus live and on-demand. Stay tuned for the date, time, and TV schedule for this exciting PRCA event.
